records.ety: [F. compartiment, OF. compartir to divide. See Compart.]

defs: One of the parts into which an inclosed portion of space is divided, as by partitions, or lines; as, the compartments of a cabinet, a house, or a garden.
quotes: In the midst was placed a large compartment composed of grotesque work.

defs: One of the sections into which the hold of a ship is divided by water-tight bulkheads.
